case_title: JESSICA LYNN WORTHY VS. JENNIFER SCHLADOR

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-04-2022 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,000.00 FILED BY WORTHY, JESSICA LYNN AS TO DEFENDANT SCHLADOR, JENNIFER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-04-2022 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $75) SERVED DEC-17-2021, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SCHLADOR, JENNIFER
JUDGMENT ASSIGNED BY JUDGMENT CREDITOR WORTHY, JESSICA LYNN ASSIGNED TO LEE, JAMES LEONARD D/B/A JUDGEMENT RECOVERY SPECIALIST
PROOF OF SERVICE OF ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF ASSIGNMENT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY ASSIGNEE LEE, JAMES LEONARD D/B/A JUDGEMENT RECOVERY SPECIALIST SERVED JUL-14-2023, MAIL AS TO DEFENDANT SCHLADOR, JENNIFER
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, PARTIALLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT SCHLADOR, JENNIFER

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-04-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-04-2022 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF JESSICA LYNN WORTHY IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: A. DATT. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WORTHY, JESSICA LYNN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SCHLADOR, JENNIFER $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $125.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,625.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
